mapper.select: SELECT T.PRICE_ID , T.PROGRAM_ID , T.PRICE_TYPE , T.PRICE_NM , T.PRICE , T.USE_YN , P.PROGRAM_NM FROM TICKET_PRICE T LEFT JOIN PROGRAM P ON T.PROGRAM_ID = P.PROGRAM_ID WHERE T.PRICE_ID = #{priceId}

SELECT T.PRICE_ID , T.PROGRAM_ID , T.PRICE_TYPE , T.PRICE_NM , T.PRICE , T.USE_YN , P.PROGRAM_NM FROM TICKET_PRICE T LEFT JOIN PROGRAM P ON T.PROGRAM_ID = P.PROGRAM_ID WHERE 1=1
AND T.PRICE_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND T.PRICE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY T.PRICE_ID ASC OFFSET #{firstIndex} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{recordCountPerPage} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM TICKET_PRICE T LEFT JOIN PROGRAM P ON T.PROGRAM_ID = P.PROGRAM_ID WHERE 1=1
AND T.PRICE_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND T.PRICE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')

SELECT T.PRICE_ID , T.PROGRAM_ID , T.PRICE_TYPE , T.PRICE_NM , T.PRICE , T.USE_YN , P.PROGRAM_NM FROM TICKET_PRICE T LEFT JOIN PROGRAM P ON T.PROGRAM_ID = P.PROGRAM_ID WHERE T.PROGRAM_ID = #{programId} AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY T.PRICE_TYPE ASC
